name: AA_HESAP_OZETI_KONSOLIDE
definition:
--USE [TIGER3]
--GO

--/****** Object:  View [dbo].[AA_GIDER_RAPORU_YENI_KONSOLIDE]    Script Date: 10.04.2023 12:10:36 ******/
--SET ANSI_NULLS ON
--GO

--SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
--GO

CREATE VIEW  [dbo].[AA_HESAP_OZETI_KONSOLIDE] AS

select 
'Restar 2023' AS FIRMA,
'2023' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_123_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE  H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE)

UNION ALL

select 
'Restar 2022' AS FIRMA,
'2022' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_001_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE  H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE)

UNION ALL

select 
'Restar 2021' AS FIRMA,
'2021' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2021 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_001_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE  H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE)


UNION ALL

select 
'Hotomobil 2022' AS FIRMA,
'2022' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2022 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_002_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE
H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_002_01_EMFLINE)


UNION ALL

select 
'Hotomobil 2023' AS FIRMA,
'2023' AS YIL,
LEFT(H.CODE,3) AS ANA_KOD,
H.CODE
,H.DEFINITION_
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM'
,ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT*-1) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2023 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'

from LG_223_EMUHACC  AS H


WHERE H.CODE IN (SELECT ACCOUNTCODE FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE)
